title: Health HUD
description: Show hearts for health above, under, left or right of the player. Show damage or heal numbers.
body:
# HealthHUD

See the health of every nearby entity at a glance — floating hearts above their heads and damage numbers that fly off when they take a hit.

---

## Features

### Health Bars
Floating hearts rendered in world space above every living entity. Supports multiple display modes:
- **Hearts** — classic heart icons that fill and empty with health
- **Numeric** — shows `12.5 / 20` style text
- **Percentage** — shows health as a `%`

The bar colour shifts from green → yellow → red as health drops.

### Floating Damage & Heal Numbers
When an entity takes damage, a red number drifts upward from them. Healing shows a green number. Both fade out smoothly and drift at a configurable speed. No dark background — just clean coloured text in the world.

### In-game Settings GUI
Open the settings screen any time with `/healthhud`. Adjust everything without touching a config file:

| Setting | Description |
|---|---|
| Health Bar Mode | Switch between Hearts / Numeric / Percentage |
| Damage Numbers | Toggle damage numbers on/off |
| Healing Numbers | Toggle healing numbers on/off |
| Bar Position | Above / Below / Left / Right of the entity |
| Health Bar Size | Scale the hearts up or down |
| Damage Number Size | Scale the floating numbers |
| Entity Offset | Push the bar closer or further from the entity |
| Float Speed | How fast damage numbers drift upward |
| Hearts Per Row | How many hearts per row before wrapping |

---

## Usage

- **Open settings:** `/healthhud` in chat or the chat bar
- Hearts are shown for all living entities within 32 blocks
- Your own health bar is hidden in first-person view

---

## Credits

Made by **codx**
